posts.raw_content:
Trump is reportedly no longer interested in negotiation.

The bombing is back. Muslim terrorists die by the hundreds day after day. It’s like a hunter with a machine gun taking old wild hogs. BOOM! BOOM! BOOM! Another muzzie bites the dust.

Trump heard you faggots whining about “forever wars” and “da Jews” and all your other stupid shit. He also heard patriots and intelligent generals explain reality to him: you cannot negotiate with Iranian terrorists. Trump knows Iran cannot have a nuclear bomb.

Trump chose his path, he is not going to stop the war because you Muslim cucks screech bloody murder about your wife’s boyfriend Mohammad being blown to smithereens. You’ve repeated your entire notecard of knowledge of middle eastern history and said all your talking points about Israel 10,000x — literally nobody cares.

You may want to find a new website, as nobody from MAGA likes you and you’re obviously just here because you’re a bunch of unpopular losers. If you tried to lead your own movement you couldn’t fill a small mini van with followers. So your disgusting smelly ass is here trying to hijack Trump’s movement.

Sorry but it won’t work. Trump is smart, funny, brilliant and likeable. You’re the opposite. You can bitch and cry all day but the bombing will continue, you will never stop it, and you will never sabotage MAGA with your disingenuous Fuentes Faggot tactics: virgin anti-Semites larping as maga “cmon guys, abandon Trump!” Go start your own website. I suggest the following domains:

- DeSantis.CUCK
- Massie.LOSE

Seethe and rage. Or shut the fuck up. Either way, nobody cares.
